description:
## Objective
Comprehensive audit of the Astro/Starlight documentation site (apps/docs/) — NOT the individual component documentation pages (those are handled by LAUNCH READY tickets).

## Scope

### 1. Fact-Check All Content
- Component count badge in sidebar says "84" — verify against actual component directories (currently 73 in packages/hx-library/src/components/)
- Update `apps/docs/astro.config.mjs` sidebar badge to reflect accurate count
- Verify all claims about features, capabilities, test counts, etc. are accurate
- Check all internal links resolve correctly
- Verify GitHub social link points to correct org/repo (bookedsolidtech/helix, not himerus/wc-2026)

### 2. Tone Overhaul
- Remove all "interview prep" language and tone throughout the site
- Replace with "lessons from the battlefield" — practical, battle-tested, impactful
- This is a production component library site, not a portfolio piece
- Keep technical depth but shift framing from "look what I can do" to "here's what works and why"

### 3. Showcase Pages
- Review all existing showcase/architecture/prototype pages
- Ensure each one is genuinely impactful and tells a compelling story
- These should read like case studies or war stories, not feature demos
- Verify code examples are accurate and runnable
- Remove or rework any pages that feel thin or self-promotional

### 4. Navigation & Structure
- Verify sidebar categories match actual component organization
- Ensure all navigation links work
- Check that the site builds cleanly: `npm run build:docs`

## Key Files
- `apps/docs/astro.config.mjs` — sidebar config, badge counts, social links
- `apps/docs/src/content/docs/` — all documentation pages
- `apps/docs/src/components/` — custom Astro components used in docs

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All factual claims verified or corrected
- [ ] Component count badge accurate
- [ ] GitHub link points to correct repo
- [ ] Zero "interview prep" tone remaining
- [ ] All showcase pages are impactful and accurate
- [ ] `npm run build:docs` passes cleanly
- [ ] `npm run verify` passes
title: AUDIT: Astro/Starlight Documentation Site — Fact-Check, Tone Overhaul & Showcase Polish
